title: Measuring Head Repair — Space ARN84BTH
description: Repair of the electronic measuring head for a Space ARN84BTH wheel alignment system. The ARN800 sensor unit was disassembled, diagnosed at electronic level, repaired and verified for correct communication with the alignment system.
image_alt: Space ARN84BTH ARN800 measuring head repair wheel alignment equipment AKEI Latvia
meta_description: Space ARN84BTH ARN800 measuring head repair for wheel alignment system. Electronic diagnostics and component-level repair.
